message:
Remove hardcoded path exclusions and add summarization prompt detection

Exclusion strategy:
- Check conversation content for exclusion markers
- Detect summarization conversations by prompt pattern
- No hardcoded project paths (organize via filesystem instead)

Users should move meta-conversations out of ~/.claude/projects to prevent indexing.

Exclusion markers:
- DO NOT INDEX marker (for sensitive/meta work)
- NO_INSIGHTS_FOUND marker (for insights extraction conversations)
- Summarization prompt pattern (automatically exclude summary generation)
